name: jarvis
description: Jarvis — Personal AI agent via Telegram & Web (local Ollama + optional Groq/Gemini for API mode)

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');function cp(s,d){fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const e of fs.readdirSync(s,{withFileTypes:true})){const sp=p.join(s,e.name),dp=p.join(d,e.name);e.isDirectory()?cp(sp,dp):fs.copyFileSync(sp,dp)}}cp('web-ui','dist/web-ui')"
